holdings.infoBox: TLG is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 17.46%, Alphabet at 8.76%, Microsoft at 7.88%, Broadcom at 7.82%, and Amazon.com at 6.58%.

overview.description: The Touchstone Large Company Growth ETF (TLG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed, concentrated portfolio of US large-cap growth companies. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation. TLG was launched on Aug 28, 2009 and is issued by Touchstone.
